name: Synup Social vs. Zoho Social
hero_summary: While Zoho Social seems like a dream for teams who want a fully integrated tech stack, the pipe dream is too good to be true. The lack of post customizations, insights, and poor support make Zoho a stop-gap for teams seeking a better solution. If this is you, we have the perfect answer: Synup Social! Renowned for our tracking and data capabilities, we make it easy to create your best posts yet (we’re talking one-click easy).
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: Synup Social empowers you to do more with less. Zoho Social’s interface has a steep learning curve with limited payoff, giving you less-than-valuable insights on a buggy interface. With an intuitive interface and keen insights that will make your content sing, Synup stands out for its:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Discover what makes your audience tick
section_2_slider_1_summary: To see results, you need a data-driven tool. Zoho Social’s analytics lack the post-by-post analysis that lets you see what drives day-to-day engagement. With Synup, see which posts are driving engagement over time via interactive engagement graphs. Get ready to grow!
section_2_slider_2_heading: Insights for your best content ideas
section_2_slider_2_summary: Create your best content ever with just one click! While Zoho Social provides no content creation support, Synup inspires your top-performing posts. You can revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more. Plus, competitor tracking, trend forecasting, and post analytics give you the foresight to stay on top of your game.
section_2_step_3_summary: Collaboration is the name of the game. While Zoho Social’s bare-bones approval workflow makes it difficult to collaborate with your team without an offline discussion, Synup Social empowers you to manage your content with ease. Say goodbye to back-and-forth messages, and hello to seamless approval workflows with your team (and your clients!)
section_2_slider_4_summary: Zoho Social’s basic support for agencies doesn’t cut it, turning a single post into a huge chore. With Synup Social, you can schedule multi-location and multi-brand posts simultaneously! Synup Social makes it simple for brands with multiple locations to manage their social profiles for tens to thousands of locations - all from one platform.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Zoho Social?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Zoho Social and Synup Social are both renowned for being part of all-in-one marketing solutions, but Synup does it right, taking the cake when it comes to analytics, post creation, pricing, collaboration, and user-friendliness. Synup Social is perfect for small businesses, agencies, and enterprises alike! Take a look at how they stack up:
